overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Hogwarts Legacy depicting the Great Hall interior with gothic architecture, streaming sunlight through tall windows, and students in wizard robes moving through the space. The stationary camera captures NPCs walking, sitting at wooden tables, and casting spells in a medieval dining hall setting.

entered.detail: gothic stone walls with wooden beam ceiling and upper balcony level
long wooden tables with benches arranged in rows across the stone floor
large curved stone arch framing the left side of the viewport
tall gothic windows streaming morning sunlight onto the floor
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the ceiling above the tables
stone balcony with wooden railings on the upper level against the back wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stationary view of a gothic great hall with sunlight streaming through tall windows. Wooden dining tables fill the center space while a student stands near the tables. The stone archway frames the left side and an iron chandelier hangs from the high ceiling.

agents.ego_description: maintaining stationary position while observing the two students crossing the foreground

segments.scene_description: Two students enter from the left and walk across the foreground, increasing the crowd density from sparse to moderate. The camera remains fixed as the pair moves through the sunlit hall, passing the wooden dining tables while other students remain seated in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with dining tables

segments.scene_description: The two students stop in the right foreground and engage in a magical interaction, with one casting a spell. Additional students continue to move through the hall, including one walking from left to center who eventually sits at a table. The warm sunlight continues to illuminate the gothic architecture throughout the stationary shot.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a stationary view of a gothic great hall that transforms from a quiet, sun-drenched space into a hub of student activity and magical interaction. It begins with a serene scene of sunlight streaming through tall windows, illuminating wooden dining tables and a lone student beneath a high ceiling with an iron chandelier. As the camera remains fixed, the atmosphere shifts from sparse to moderate density when two students enter from the left and walk across the foreground. The scene then evolves as these students stop in the right foreground to engage in a magical interaction, with one casting a spell while others continue to drift through the hall. Finally, the movement settles as a student walking from the left takes a seat at a table, all while the warm light continues to bathe the stone archways and gothic architecture.
